title: Glazed Silky Venezuelan Aubergine Frittata
description: A creamy, savory frittata featuring caramelized baby aubergines glazed with guava jam and soy sauce, finished with a silky egg custard and sprinkled with sesame seeds.

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: whisked with salt, pepper, and cilantro

instructions: Whisk eggs with salt, pepper, and cilantro in a bowl.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-proof skillet over medium-high heat; add sliced aubergine and sauté until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Stir in sugar, soy sauce, guava jam, and lime juice; cook, stirring, until glaze thickens and the aubergines are glossy, about 3 minutes.
Remove skillet from heat and sprinkle shredded mozzarella and sesame seeds over the aubergines.
Pour the egg mixture evenly over the aubergines, ensuring the eggs cover the vegetables.
Transfer skillet to the preheated oven and bake until the eggs set and the top is golden, about 15-18 minutes.
Let the frittata rest for 5 minutes, then slice and serve warm.
Garnish with extra cilantro if desired.
